languages.text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.
languages.original_text: Все противники в {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}области действия{/g} Боевого гимна или Яростного выступления получают +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}тревожности{/g}. Противники на соседних клетках с поборником веры вместо этого получают +2 уровня тревожности. Демоны в области действия эффекта получают {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g}, равный {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}моментуму{/g}, который накапливает поборник веры при применении этой {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g}.

traits.locale_text: All enemies in the area of effect of War Hymn gain +1 stack of the disturbed effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the priest gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer damage equal to the momentum restored to the priest while using this ability.

All enemies in the area of effect of War Hymn gain +1 stack of the disturbed effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the priest gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer damage equal to the momentum restored to the priest while using this ability.

All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

languages.text: Alle Feinde im {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}Wirkungsbereich{/g} von Kriegshymne oder Inbrünstige Rezitation erhalten +1 Stapel des Effekts {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}Verstört{/g}. Feinde, die sich neben dem Anhänger befinden, erhalten stattdessen +2 Verstört-Stapel. Außerdem erleiden alle Dämonen im Wirkungsbereich {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} in Höhe der {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}Dynamik{/g}, die der Anhänger bei der Anwendung dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} wiederhergestellt hat.
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Alle Gegner im Wirkungsbereich von Kriegshymne erhalten +1 Mal den aufaddierbaren Effekt Verstört. Gegner, die sich neben dem Priester befinden, erhalten stattdessen +2 Mal den Effekt Verstört. Außerdem erleiden alle Dämonen im Wirkungsbereich Schaden in Höhe der Dynamik, die der Priester bei der Anwendung dieser Fähigkeit wiederhergestellt hat.

languages.text: Tous les ennemis dans la {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}zone d'effet{/g} d'Hymne de guerre ou de Récital furieux bénéficient de +1 cumul de l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}Perturbation{/g}. Les ennemis adjacents au dévot reçoivent +2 cumuls de Perturbation. De plus, tous les démons présents dans la zone d'effet subissent un nombre de points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} égal à la {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}fougue{/g} restituée au dévot lorsqu'il utilise cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g}.
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Tous les ennemis dans la {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}zone d'effet{/g} d'Hymne de guerre ou de Récital furieux bénéficient de +1 cumul de l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}Perturbation{/g}. Les ennemis adjacents au dévot reçoivent +2 cumuls de Perturbation. De plus, tous les démons présents dans la zone d'effet subissent un nombre de points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} égal à la {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}fougue{/g} restituée au dévot lorsqu'il utilise cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g}.

languages.text: 战争礼赞或愤怒颂歌{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}效果范围{/g}内的所有敌人都会获得1层{g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}惊扰{/g}效果。与牧师相邻的敌人会获得2层“惊扰”效果。 此外，使用此能力时，效果范围内所有恶魔都会受到{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}，等同于此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}为牧师恢复的{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}士气{/g}值。
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 战争礼赞效果范围内的所有敌人都会获得1层“惊扰”效果。与牧师相邻的敌人会获得2层“惊扰”效果。 此外，使用此能力时，效果范围内所有恶魔都会受到伤害，等同于此能力为牧师恢复的士气值。

languages.text: Todos los enemigos en el {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}área de efecto{/g} de Himno de guerra o Recital furioso sufren +1 acumulación del efecto {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}perturbado{/g}. Los enemigos adyacentes al devoto reciben +2 acumulaciones. Además, todos los daemons en el área de efecto sufren {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} igual al {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}ímpetu{/g} que recupera el devoto al usar esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g}.
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Todos los enemigos en el área de efecto de Himno de guerra sufren +1 acumulación del efecto perturbado. Los enemigos adyacentes al sacerdote reciben +2 acumulaciones. Además, todos los daemons en el área de efecto sufren daño igual al ímpetu que recupera el sacerdote al usar esta capacidad.

languages.text: 怒りのリサイタルの{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}範囲内{/g}にいるすべての敵は、{g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}動揺{/g}効果を1スタック得る。信者に隣接している敵は、代わりに2スタックの動揺を得る。 さらに、この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}を使用している間、範囲内のすべてのディーモンは信者が回復した{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}推進力{/g}に等しい{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受ける。
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 戦の聖歌の範囲内にいるすべての敵は、動揺効果を1スタック得る。プリーストに隣接している敵は、代わりに2スタックの動揺を得る。 さらに、このアビリティを使用している間、範囲内のすべてのディーモンはプリーストが回復した推進力に等しいダメージを受ける。

languages.text: Все противники в {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}области действия{/g} Боевого гимна или Яростного выступления получают +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}тревожности{/g}. Противники на соседних клетках с поборником веры вместо этого получают +2 уровня тревожности. Демоны в области действия эффекта получают {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g}, равный {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}моментуму{/g}, который накапливает поборник веры при применении этой {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g}.
languages.original_text: All enemies in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g} of War Hymn or Furious Recital gain +1 stack of the {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}disturbed{/g} effect. Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Все противники в области действия Боевого гимна получают +1 уровень тревожности. Противники на соседних клетках со священником вместо этого получают +2 уровня тревожности. Демоны в области действия эффекта получают урон, равный моментуму, который накапливает священник при применении этой способности.

Все противники в области действия Боевого гимна получают +1 уровень тревожности. Противники на соседних клетках со священником вместо этого получают +2 уровня тревожности. Демоны в области действия эффекта получают урон, равный моментуму, который накапливает священник при применении этой способности.

languages.text: Savaş İlahisi veya Hiddetli Resital kabiliyetlerinin {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}etki alanında{/g} bulunan tüm düşmanlar, +1 {g|Encyclopedia:DisturbedEffect}kaygılı{/g} etkisi birikimi elde ederler. Zahidin bitişik hücresindeki düşmanlarda ise bu birikim +2'ye çıkar. Ayrıca etki alanında bulunan tüm iblisler de zahidin bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} kullanırken ürettiği {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentuma{/g} eşit miktarda {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasara{/g} maruz kalırlar.

Enemies that are adjacent to the devotee gain +2 stacks of disturbed instead. Also, all daemons in the area of effect suffer {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} equal to the {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} restored to the devotee while using this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}.
